description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The exterior is predominantly white, with large rectangular sections and a spacious garage attached to one side. The house is surrounded by lush landscaping, including several flowering trees in shades of pink and purple, which create a vibrant and inviting atmosphere. The backyard features a pool and a green lawn area, partially enclosed by a wooden privacy screen. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of small and large panes, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing the contemporary design.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, attached garage, and vibrant flowering trees surrounding a backyard pool and lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, and a row of flowering trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the dense cluster of flowering trees and partial view of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the lush landscaping and trees, with the house mostly obscured by foliage.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the backyard, pool, green lawn, and the house's geometric layout with surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, no porch, and clean lines emphasizing a contemporary look.
